allOf.title: defaultManagedAppProtection

customSettings.description: A set of string key and string value pairs to be sent to the affected users, unalterned by this service

deployedAppCount.description: Count of apps to which the current policy is deployed.

disableAppEncryptionIfDeviceEncryptionIs.description: When this setting is enabled, app level encryption is disabled if device level encryption is enabled. (Android only)

encryptAppData.description: Indicates whether managed-app data should be encrypted. (Android only)

faceIdBlocked.description: Indicates whether use of the FaceID is allowed in place of a pin if PinRequired is set to True. (iOS Only)

minimumRequiredPatchVersion.description: Define the oldest required Android security patch level a user can have to gain secure access to the app. (Android only)

minimumRequiredSdkVersion.description: Versions less than the specified version will block the managed app from accessing company data. (iOS Only)

minimumWarningPatchVersion.description: Define the oldest recommended Android security patch level a user can have for secure access to the app. (Android only)

screenCaptureBlocked.description: Indicates whether screen capture is blocked. (Android only)

apps.description: List of apps to which the policy is deployed.

deploymentSummary.description: Navigation property to deployment summary of the configuration.

allOf.description: Policy used to configure detailed management settings for a specified set of apps for all users not targeted by a TargetedManagedAppProtection Policy
